assertions.reason: The app loaded successfully at /, displayed the map surface with live story stats, and no browser errors were reported after clearing and reloading the headed validation session.
evidence: Screenshot: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/frontend-refactor/frontend-shell-routing/home-headed-annotated.png shows the globe rendered with live stats and UI controls.
Headed session reload followed by agent-browser errors returned no entries.

assertions.reason: Routing works both via in-app navigation and direct URL access, and at least one in-app navigation occurred without a full page reload.
evidence: Clicking the Admin nav link changed the path to /admin while window.__spaMarker remained "alive" and performance navigation entry count stayed at 1.
Direct navigation to /region/US loaded the region detail route with heading "United States", ISO "US", and 145 rendered article cards.

assertions.reason: Switching between globe and flat modes worked, and both views preserved the same live data counts.
evidence: Globe mode displayed stats of 133 regions, 1975 stories, 29 verified, and 174 critical.
After clicking the Flat tab, the selected mode changed to Flat while the same stats remained visible.

assertions.reason: At a 375px-wide mobile viewport the map remained visible, the bottom controls were reachable, and the drawer was not overlapping the main map surface.
evidence: At viewport 375x812, DOM inspection reported hasDrawerOpen=false, mapCanvasCount=2, and hasNewsPanel=true.

Screenshot: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/frontend-refactor/frontend-shell-routing/mobile-home-fresh-annotated.png shows the mobile layout with map, search, and bottom action buttons.

frictions: Headless Chromium could not create a WebGL context for react-globe.gl, so globe rendering was validated in a headed browser session.
Canvas-based map surfaces are not reliably clickable through accessibility refs, so route and region assertions relied on URL navigation and supported region-selection affordances.
